overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit street market in a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The player moves through narrow walkways and open market areas with heavy atmospheric fog and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway beneath elevated transit line

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow walkway beneath an elevated structure, passing seated pedestrians on benches

notable_agents.action: seated on a red bench against the concrete wall
pedestrian in white jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large red neon arrow sign mounted on the concrete wall
tall concrete barrier wall with graffiti and mounted objects
elevated train tracks or walkway spanning across the street
tall building with large digital advertising screens

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow concrete walkway beneath an elevated transit line in a foggy cyberpunk district. A prominent red neon arrow sign illuminates the right wall where pedestrians sit on benches, while digital billboards glow in the distant fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area leading to covered market

events.description: passing a blonde pedestrian in a white jacket walking in the opposite direction
walkway widens and market stalls become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through increasing pedestrian traffic, navigating around standing and walking NPCs

notable_agents.action: blonde woman in white jacket and sunglasses walking past the camera

entered.detail: food stall with bright cyan neon lighting and red paper lanterns
large green dumpster with open lid on the sidewalk
illuminated digital billboard showing animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens up as the camera passes a blonde pedestrian and approaches a market area. A dumpster appears on the left while a brightly lit cyan food stall comes into view on the right, signaling the transition to the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street market with food vendors

events.description: entering the main market area with multiple food stalls and bright neon lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating through the bustling market area, passing various food vendors and shoppers

notable_agents.action: vendor working at a food stall with bright cyan lighting
pedestrian in dark coat walking through the market

entered.detail: large purple neon sign with 'TENGU' text and demon face logo
wooden food stall with warm yellow lighting and striped awning
tall building with multiple balconies and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Deep within the covered market, the camera moves past food stalls illuminated by cyan and yellow neon lights. The 'TENGU' sign glows purple on the left while vendors work at their stalls, creating a dense cyberpunk market atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, foggy transit corridor into the vibrant heart of a neon-lit street market. It begins along a narrow concrete walkway beneath an elevated transit line, where a red neon arrow casts a glow over pedestrians resting on benches amidst a dense haze. As the camera passes a blonde pedestrian, the walkway opens up and the environment shifts toward a commercial zone, marked by a dumpster on the left and the emergence of a brightly lit cyan food stall. The scene then expands deep into the covered market, moving past a series of vendors illuminated by clashing cyan and yellow neon lights. Finally, the camera glides further into the dense atmosphere, passing a purple glowing Tengu sign as the urban bustle fully envelops the view.
